summary: Iteration 5 - Equipment events journal + sidebar cleanup. Backend: 7/7 new tests pass on /api/equipment/events (initial state, user-source manual toggle logs 'manuelle', coupling event on pump-off has exact reason 'Arrêt automatique suite à l'arrêt de la pompe', equipment_id filter works, limit=1 returns exactly 1, 409 electrolyseur-without-pump does NOT log, noop toggle same-state does NOT log). Regression: 17/17 previous tests still pass (dashboard, sensors, equipment, schedule, settings, widgets, alerts, system, zigbee CRUD, coupling). Frontend (1024x600): Sidebar has exactly 8 items (home, equipment, zigbee, schedule, history, alerts, widgets, settings) - nav-temperature and nav-water are correctly ABSENT. Equipment screen renders EquipmentCard + equipment-events-card with 5 filter chips (all/filtration/electrolyseur/heat_pump/lighting) and events-refresh button. Refresh loads 17 event rows; clicking Filtration chip narrows to 8 rows all belonging to filtration. All 7 other screens (home, zigbee, schedule, history, alerts, widgets, settings) navigate without errors. No red screen, no runtime errors (only benign React 19 ref deprecation warning from a lib and pointerEvents deprecation warning - not blocking).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - likely from a third-party lib (gesture-handler/reanimated). Non-blocking, does not affect functionality.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~940 lines; consider splitting into modules (routes/, services/) in a future iteration for maintainability. Not urgent.
log_equipment_event is well-placed and only fires on real state change - correct behaviour verified.
seed_data_creation: Backend DB was wiped before tests to start fresh; test suite creates events via API toggles then verifies. No manual seed data required beyond default equipment/schedules/widgets/zigbee seeds.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Feature complete and verified end-to-end. Backend endpoint GET /api/equipment/events supports optional ?equipment_id= and ?limit= filters. Sidebar reduced to 8 items. EquipmentPage has testID equipment-screen, equipment-events-card, events-filter-{all|filtration|electrolyseur|heat_pump|lighting}, events-refresh, event-row-{id}.
